creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-11-24 05:20:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/p5-Blog-Spam     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  The blogspam site exists to provide a service which allows you to
  test whether a submitted blog/forum comment is SPAM or not, in real-time.
  
  We can identify many common SPAM characteristics and using them allow
  comments to be blocked - cutting down on the SPAM that might otherwise
  affect your site.
  
  WWW:    http://blogspam.net/
  
  PR:             ports/152421
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2749    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +58 -0     ports/www/p5-Blog-Spam/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/www/p5-Blog-Spam/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/p5-Blog-Spam/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/www/p5-Blog-Spam/pkg-plist (new)
